title: A Meeting That Changes Shandora
description: The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene focuses on Calgara, Mont Blanc Noland, Wyper, Musse, Luffy. The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: So you'll... let me come here again...?

summary: The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.
